SEARCH
Package com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers

Class ReferendumCreateController

java.lang.Object
com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.ReferendumCreateController
@Component public class ReferendumCreateController extends Object
Controller class for managing the creation of referendums.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReferendumCreateController

      public ReferendumCreateController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize() throws IOException
      Initializes the referendum creation controller. Sets up the UI components and event handlers.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • createSimple

      public void createSimple()
      Event handler for the simple referendum radio button. Hides unnecessary sliders and labels.

    • createQuota

      public void createQuota()
      Event handler for the quota referendum radio button. Shows the expected participation slider and label, hides the local vote quota label.

    • createConditional

      public void createConditional()
      Event handler for the conditional referendum radio button. Shows both the expected participation and minimum local voters sliders and labels.

    • createReferendum

      public void createReferendum() throws IOException
      Creates a new referendum based on the input provided by the user. Saves the referendum to the database and navigates to the region select view.
      Throws:
      IOException
